title: Peak - Vanilla+ Server Pack
description: Better world gen, smoother gameplay, and a plethora of QOL improvements
body:
# ![Peak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8daaa824f278b6f8492efdc859102ee772003d2.png)

_A server pack with better world gen, smoother gameplay, and a plethora of QOL improvements_

# Features
- **Faster gameplay** with **Sodium** and other performance enhancing mods
- **Dynamic Lights** so you can see in the dark
- **Extra Structures** with **Dungeons and Taverns**
- **Better World Gen** with **Terralith, Nullscape, Geophilic,** and **Tectonic**
- **Cooler mobs** with **Al's Resource Packs**
- **QOL Features** like **Trade Cycling** and **Bridging Mod**

# Extra Downloads
- [Better Illagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-illagers/download/5311395)
